source.command: curl -sS -m 5 -H 'Authorization: Bearer <local-token>' http://127.0.0.1:8935/metrics -o <TEMP_DIR>/goal-loop-live-metrics.prom && python3 scripts/goal_loop_metrics_snapshot.py <TEMP_DIR>/goal-loop-live-metrics.prom --set recovery_strategy_executed_total_1h=0 --pretty

manual_overrides.recovery_strategy_executed_total_1h: 0, derived from the redacted log-contract report where recovery_strategy_executed is required_missing
